agentRecommendation.reasoning: Only candidate, but passes ALL ten §6 rules — the first in the entire Tier A pipeline to do so without any override. CC-BY 4.0 licence is clean. 5303x3047 resolution gives excellent crop headroom. Explicitly geo-tagged to Merricks, Victoria. The brief predicted this slot would defer — this image cancels the deferral.
